texto: My love for her is beyond any love I have ever heard described. It is a love that is beyond love
autor: a soul connection in which no seam is visible.
explicacao: Citação de a soul connection in which no seam is visible. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “My love for her is beyond any love I have ever heard described. It is a love that is beyond love” articula reflexao, steve-maraboli, beyond em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
